image:image.image:title: JJ speaking anti incineration protest Big One
Zero Hour NCD Launch Full Supply Full Res-2
HS2 High Speed Rail Construction, Harefield, Uxbridge, UK
image:image.image:caption: Harefield, Uxbridge, UK. 22nd June, 2022. An HS2 compound in Harefield which includes a former SSSI at Broadwater Lake. Hillingdon Green party Co-Ordinator, Sarah Green and Stop HS2 environmentalists met Baroness Jenny Jones of Moulsecoomb from the Green Party today outside the HS2 Harvil Road compound to discuss the impact HS2 are having on the aquifer and water supplies. Despite the average age of the party being over 60 and the fact that they were standing on public land outside the HS2 fencing, HS2 Security called for backup. Credit: © Maureen McLean Photography

flowers-for-road-crash-victim
image:image.image:caption:
NEWS for Danny Longhorn - 23-11-11 Floral tributes left at the scene of a road traffic collision (RTC) in which Lewis Penson died on the A1033 between Patrington and Hollym. Picture: Peter Harbour
Prints of this picture can be ordered from www.thisisphotosales.co.uk/hullandeastriding or telephone 08444 060 910
KEYWORDS:
JJ and Natalie Bennett on their second visit to the Calais Jungle
